logo.usage_notes: Primary lockup is the orange ELITEZ wordmark with navy 'GROUP OF COMPANIES' tagline and the navy 'person' glyph forming the T crossbar. Use logo.png on light backgrounds (paper #F5EFDC, panel #FDF9E8). The logo-mark.png is the wordmark-only variant for tighter horizontal lockups (footers, nav). No SVG was recoverable from the source pptx; raster only at 774x319 (logo) and 1448x237 (mark). Maintain ≥ 16px padding around the lockup; never recolour the orange (#EE6A1F) or the navy (#0E2640) glyph.

imagery.caption: Elitez Group Southeast Asia footprint — Singapore HQ, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, India presence markers
Signature corner-anchored orange wave motif used across ESOP deck dividers
Particle-dot wave variant — secondary accent texture for hero blocks
Orange-yellow city skyline silhouette used on growth/market slides
KPMG March 2024 pricing analysis cover photography — contract signing scene; ESOP credibility marker
KPMG enterprise value summary — DCF (3 cases) + market approach (comparable companies + transactions); EV range SGD 32.9m–37.0m, implied EV/EBITDA 8.0x–9.0x
KPMG equity value summary — equity range SGD 28.0m–32.1m, implied P/E 10.5x–12.1x
KPMG comparable-companies trading multiples — APAC staffing peers (Pasona, UT, en-japan, HRnetGroup, Persol, Spectrum, GO2 People)
KPMG comparable transactions — recent staffing M&A precedents (Openjobmetis, OUTSOURCING Inc., Bain, Volt, Alma Career, etc.)
Elitez Group shareholding structure — 3 co-founders (33.33% each) over 7 operating entities (Pte Ltd, & Associates, FMCG, Security, Dynamic Human Capital, Jobs Today, Property)
